---
name: "🎨 UI/UX Request"
about: "Request a UI/UX improvement or design update"
title: "🎨 [Brief, descriptive title of the UI/UX Request]"
labels: ["ui/ux", "enhancement", "design"]
assignees: []
---

## 🎯 Objective
Describe the UI/UX improvement or design request.

**Example:** "Redesign the user profile page to improve readability and mobile responsiveness."

## 🧩 Current Design
- Attach screenshots or links of the current design.
- Describe issues with the current experience (e.g., confusing layout, poor accessibility, inconsistent style).

## ✨ Desired Design
- Attach mockups, wireframes, or Figma links.
- Describe desired changes clearly.
- Include any color, typography, or spacing guidelines.

## 📱 User Impact
- Who will benefit from this change?
- How will it improve user experience?

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Design is consistent with style guide / design system.
- [ ] Layout is responsive on desktop and mobile.
- [ ] Accessibility standards met (WCAG 2.1).
- [ ] Usability tested or feedback incorporated.

## 🧪 Testing Notes
- [ ] Manual review of UI changes.
- [ ] Check responsiveness and accessibility.
- [ ] Ensure consistency with other components/pages.

## 🚀 Definition of Done
- [ ] Design finalized and approved.
- [ ] Implemented in the application.
- [ ] Verified by QA or design lead.
